name: netelip
description: netelip API Voice v1 for launching outbound calls and returning call-control commands from API Voice callbacks. netelip's public docs expose a focused token-authenticated voice API rather than broad CRM-style REST resources.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Voice Token
credential_fields.description: netelip API Voice security token from the control panel.

credential_fields.name: api_name
credential_fields.label: Default API Name
credential_fields.description: Optional default API Voice name to use when launching calls.

tools.name: launch_call
tools.description: Launch an outbound API Voice call. Once answered, netelip calls the configured outbound call-control URL for the selected API Voice application. Call-control commands such as dial, callerid, playback, record, and hangup are returned by your webhook handler, not by a separate REST endpoint.

src.description: Caller ID shown to the called party.

duration.description: Maximum call attempt duration in seconds, 1 to 60.

userdata.description: Optional user-defined value returned in callbacks.
